stepsToReproduce: Open two authenticated Alex sessions
Read the same wishlist baseline in both sessions
Submit two PUT /api/account/wishlist requests at the same time, each adding a different item
Fetch /api/account/wishlist
identifiedBugs.actualBehavior: Final wishlist had race item A=false, race item B=true; one save appears to have overwritten the other.
